title: [Image #1] claudeについて、rate limitはopusだけ使えない？sonnetは使える？
summary_text: これで進めるのが最短です。 1. Codexを `0.102.0+` に更新 ```bash npm i -g @openai/codex@latest codex --version ``` 2. `~/.codex/config.toml` に `multi_agent` とロール定義を追加（既存設定は残す） ```toml [features] multi_agent = true [agents] max_threads = 4 [agents.explorer] description = "Read-heavy codebase exploration." config_file = "agents/explorer.toml" [agents.worker] description = "Implementation-focused coding agent." config_file = "agents/worker.toml" [agents.reviewer] description = "Security/correctness/test-risk reviewer." config_file = "agents/reviewer.toml" ``` 3. `~/.codex/agents/` を作って各ロール設定 `~/.codex/agents/explorer.toml` ```toml model = "gpt-5.3-codex-spark" model_reasoning_effort = "medium" sandbox_mode = "read-only" developer_instructions = "Explore and summarize. Do not edit files." ``` `~/.codex/agents/worker.toml` ```toml model = "gpt-5.3-codex" model_reasoning_effort = "high" developer_instructions = "Implement focused changes and add/adjust tests." ``` `~/.codex/agents/reviewer.toml` ```toml model = "gpt-5.3-codex" model_reasoning_effort = "high" sandbox_mode = "read-only" developer_instructions = "Prioritize security, correctness, regression risks, and missing tests." ``` 4. Codex再起動して、親に明示指示 ```text このブランチを multi-agent で処理して。 Explorer 2本（frontend/backend）+ Worker 1本 + Reviewer 1本を並列起動し、 全結果を待って統合して最終提案して。 ``` 5. 進行確認は `/agent` （Spawn/Send/Wait/Close はCodexが内部で実施） 参考（公式） - https://developers.openai.com/codex/multi-agent
